metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Sweet Banana is a tropical fruit with easily digestible simple sugars and a high potassium content. This makes them an ideal snack for athletes and growing children. They are also a great source of soluble fibre, pyridoxine (B6) and polyphenol antioxidants.Ideal for smoothies! Perfect for freezing and using as you need.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Sweet Bananas, simply peel them for a ready-to-eat snack or slice them into cereals, smoothies, and desserts. Mash for use in baking recipes like banana bread or pancakes for a natural sweetness. You can also freeze sliced bananas for a creamy addition to smoothies or homemade ice creams. Store at room temperature and enjoy when ripe for the best flavor.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days

product.description:
Hulu Durian, also known as Hor Lor, is a specific variety of durian, a spiky fruit known for its distinctive taste and aroma. It's characterized by its hourglass-shaped shell and blunt thorns. The pulp is thick, dense, and typically a warm yellow or white, with a sweet and slightly bitter flavor, and a dry, slightly tart texture. It's well-suited for those who prefer a less watery durian experience
--
• Delivery of Durian will be between 6PM to 10PM for all durian superman order; In the event where you will require durian at an earlier timeslot, kindly contact our Fairprice customer service team to check if it is viable.
• In the event where there is no customer to pick-up (no show) the durian at the site of delivery at the selected date of delivery, driver will attempt to call customers and also inform them that the durian is placed at the door.
• In the above scenario, customers will not be offered a refund or redelivery, unless special review is required.

metaData.Key Information: D13 durian, also known as Red Prawn durian, is a popular durian variety characterized by its sweet, milky, and sticky flesh, often with an intense sweet taste. It's readily identifiable by the orange-hued arils that resemble prawns, hence the nickname "Red Prawn"

metaData.Key Information:
One of the most popular and pricier varieties is the Musang Wang. It's characterised by its large size, and the creamy and golden-yellow flesh of Musang Wang is notably rich, smooth, and custard-like in texture.
--
Musang Wang durian seeds are typically smaller compared to the seeds of some other durian varieties. However, the size of the seeds can vary.
--
Flavour: Rich and bittersweet
Texture: Creamy and buttery

metaData.Key Information: Thai guavas are generally the size of a softball with apple green skin that can range from bumpy to smooth. The flesh is white with pale yellow seeds and tends to be drier than the pink type of guavas. The guavas are fairly sweet with a tangy bite. The crunchy flesh and hard seeds are both edible. Upon receiving, please consume product within 4-5 days. There may be slight varation for actual weight received and customers can receive up to 2-3 pieces. Distributor: Think Fresh Trading Pte Ltd, Blk 22 Wholesale Centre #01-148 Singapore 110022.<<

metaData.Key Information: Lemons are heavily utilized as a flavoring agent in various forms. The fruit is ovate with pointed ends. Its peel is semi-thick, porous and laden with essential oils. The bright yellow thin outer layer of the peel is very edible and used for multiple applications. When the peel is removed or zested it releases intense sweet citrus aromas. The flesh is translucent yellow and juicy when ripe. Its juice is highly acidic, tart and sour, though extremely versatile in its uses. Upon receiving, please consume product within 7-8 days. Freshness Guarantee: We pick the freshest item(s) and deliver to your doorstep. Opt for a refund within 3 days of delivery if your items are not delivered fresh. Check out our refund policy for fresh in the T&C for more details.

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Bananas are known to reduce swelling, protect against developing Type 2 diabetes, aid in weight loss, strengthen the nervous system and help with production of white blood cells - all due to the high level of vitamin B6 that bananas contain. Depending on your nutritional needs and preference, the best time to eat bananas change as generally, the taste and nutritional value change as they ripen. Newly-ripened bananas tend to be less sweet than well-ripened bananas because the starch hasn't fully broken down into simple sugars but you stay full for longer and enjoy the benefits of the resistant starch therein. On the other hand, a well-ripened banana with some dark patches on the skin is easier to digest and may give you the energy boost you require before playing sports.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Good Nature Organic Bananas, simply peel back the skin for an easy, ready-to-eat snack. Slice bananas to add natural sweetness to cereals, smoothies, and yogurt bowls. For baking, mash them well to incorporate into recipes like banana bread or pancakes. You can also freeze sliced bananas to use as a creamy base for smoothies or homemade ice cream.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the Fruits at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 5 days
